programmes.show_description: Cruising the Med, the crew are on tenterhooks as travel writer Adam Coulter is on board, sampling the spa, the food, and taking an excursion to a Spanish rum distillery.
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Joey makes a deal with the building superintendent to prevent him from evicting Rachel and Monica. Chandler tries to cancel his gym membership.
Exploring the darker side of drones - from how they can become a menace, causing injuries and accidents, aiding criminals, invading private space, and even paralysing airports.
The heatwave adds to the stress at Barnsley Casualty. 50-year-old Michael's brought in after collapsing at home, and a patient in pain is afraid of needles.
Two rescued grey seal pups are brought in for emergency care. (VS)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
It's Halloween, and Paddington goes Treat-or-Treating with Jonathan and Judy around Windsor gardens, but Mr Curry does not want to join in. (VS)

programmes.show_name: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programmes.show_description: Gaston catches a cold, so Holly invites him to stay at the Little Castle. Soon Gaston is eating the king's food and sleeping in his bed! (VS)
Pedro gets a cough at playschool and the other children soon catch it.
Daddy Pig has a book from the library that he has kept for too long. The family go to the library to return it and find more books to read.
Inspired by a photo of a dog being walked, Tweedy is eager to try it out with Fluff! You can guess who gets taken for a walk. Pets don't always behave the way we imagine they will... (Ep13)
Milkshake! Monkey heads off to Heckington in Lincolnshire to learn all about wind and how to fly his kite. (Ep1)
Friends: Big World Big Adventures! Darcy the tunnel excavator makes some mistakes on her first day, but soon makes up for it when everyone sees what she can really do! (VS)
When the Pontypandy Pioneers visit the fire station, Norman ends up accidentally driving Jupiter through Pontypandy. (VS)
Madame Gazelle takes the children on a trip to the Zoo where they get a tour from the zookeepers, Mr Lion, Mrs Crocodile and Mr Giraffe! (VS)
Paddington nurses a sick bird named Pigeonton back to health, but can he let him go? (VS)
When Pip and Posy decide to make a toy boat, Frankie accidentally takes over and it doesn't end up how they imagined. (VS)
...the Junk Monster. When Wingnut's junk pile and Oscar go missing at the same time, Chase and team are called in to solve the mystery. (VS)
When Sierra Sparkle's big concert stage needs some extra sparkle, Rubble & Crew use a construction complication to make a big splash.
Dr Brown Bear suggests Peppa and George have their hearing checked. The audiologist discovers George has moderate hearing loss in one ear and suggests George tries a hearing aid. (VS)
Mr Meerkat shows the children a huge wall that needs painting. They create a fantastic mural using lots of different techniques: brushes, sponges, buggy ropes and even a paint cannon!
Tim gets the best cookies in town but soon finds that others need them more than him.
When a penguin takes a shine to Stink's bed, and Grumblestunk decides to open a zoo, Brody is unimpressed, so Stan and Gran are forced to investigate!
...Powered Pogo Stick. Daring Danny X straps a rocket booster to his pogo stick to attempt the most X-treme pogo jump ever.
When Milo and his pals arrive for work at Turbo Taxis, they have to collect Dame Delores for her big concert that night. (BSL)

programmes.show_name: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programmes.show_description: Barnaby Elf's uncle Redbeard comes to visit the Little Kingdom, but he has lost his pirate treasure. (VS)
While enjoying a tea break, Mr Bull accidentally breaks his delicate teapot. So he takes the pieces to Miss Rabbit in the hope that she can mend it. (VS)
Leonardo is trying to show off his brand new feathers and becomes jealous when sharing attention with baby Eaglet. Odo and Doodle, resolve to try and help Leonardo learn to share.

programmes.show_name: Come & Play with Pip and Posy
programmes.show_description: Jen is in the Milkshake garden when Pip and Posy give her an egg-cellent idea for some new plants to grow. She and the Milkshakers put their green fingers to the test! (Ep12)
Join Jen and Lisa to read Rubble & Crew: The Clean Machine. When Speed Meister causes mischief on the racetrack, it's up to the Builder Cove construction pups to save the day.
Start the day with a dose of hard-hitting debate, your phone calls and a little fun - all driven by Jeremy's unique style.
Two of 5's much-loved faces team up to focus on the issues that matter most to viewers - with your opinions front and centre.
National and international news.
Matt looks at the big news stories developing during the day and offers help and advice to save you money and make your lives a little easier.
Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip!
A photographer, hoping to recapture the magic of his former years by recreating an iconic image of his long-lost muse, is found murdered. Jack and Kate are on the case...

programmes.show_name: New: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programmes.show_description: In Alcalali, the hills are alive with ukeleles as former firefighters-turned-budding popstars Jo and Pete prepare for their first-ever paid gig with the band.
Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.
Shetland is a prime location for spotting orcas, especially when pods hunt seals near the coast. PHD student Julia researches the relationship between the killer whales and their prey.
Susan celebrates engineer Isambard Kingdom Brunel, learns about the '60s Bristol Bus Boycott, and visits Chipping Campden and Blenheim Palace. And she enjoys a shin kicking competition!
Jeremy Vine is joined by team captains Sally Lindsay and Carol Vorderman for head-scratchingly perplexing puzzles. Guests are presenter Dr Ranj Singh and journalist Holly Hamilton.

programmes.show_name: New: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders
programmes.show_description: Police pursue a car after a member of the public is robbed by a gang armed with a crowbar and an air rifle. The chase goes off road and ends up in a hot tub!
...Taking Down the Shoplifting Gangs. Police collate intelligence from 23 police forces while investigating a man linked to organised crime, potentially connected to £78,000 in thefts.
Access-all-areas documentary following police at work in real time. The 999 comms team get a call from a woman who claims to have swallowed 40 pills.
Following a tip-off about a suspected disqualified driver, officers search for and arrest the driver of a van who, when questioned, says he has no recollection of being disqualified.
Sergeant Mick and the Operational Support Unit carry out a raid on a house with suspected drug activity.
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
A patient with a stomach ache suddenly goes into labour, sister Vicky has to perform CPR, and volunteer Jane is determined to solve a missing cutlery mystery...
Life and death, trauma and tears - the dedicated team at Barnsley A&E need to be ready for anything and everything.
Joey thinks that Chandler hates his new girlfriend. And Ross and Rachel try to make each other jealous.
Vet Tom is concerned his Shetland pony may be suffering from a fatal condition called laminitis. (VS)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Paddington has lost a special wooly hat given him by Aunt Lucy and must find it; the brave Polar explores Jonathan, Judy, and Paddington return. (VS)

programmes.show_name: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programmes.show_description: Holly and Ben take a trip to the seaside. Holly must rescue herself and Ben when the tide comes in and they are stuck in their castle. (VS)
The Camper Van: Peppa and her family take a vacation in a special van. She is surprised to find that with the push of a button, the van turns into a little house for them to sleep in.
The Camping Holiday. Peppa and her family are on holiday in their special camper van. They decide to go to Duck Land, a park where they can see the ducks in the river.
Fluff has an instinct for hiding and gets a big kick out of following Tweedy without him noticing! When Tweedy eventually finds him, Fluff discovers that Tweedy loves hide and seek too. (Ep14)
Milkshake! Monkey finds out how the Romans used to live. (Ep2)
...Friends: Big World Big Adventures! Lorenzo decides to take opera diva Bella Canto to a festival without his coach Beppe. But Lorenzo on his own is no match for Bella. (VS)
When the Big Chill strikes Pontypandy and knocks out the power at the fire station, Sam has trouble lighting a fire. (VS)
Peppa, George, Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig visit the Kangaroo family in Australia and get to explore The Outback. (VS)
The family all have chores except Paddington. So as not to be excluded, Mr. Brown creates a list for him, but Paddington picks up the wrong list. (VS)
Jamila suggests a new insect game to Pip and Posy but they don't think it's as fun as playing magical dragons, until they realise Jamila knows a lot of cool facts about insects. (VS)
Shortly after listening to the story of Thundermouth, the pups are on a mission to save elephants spooked by a scary noise. (VS)
Rubble & Crew decide to go big when Grocer Gabriel wants something special built outside of his grocery store.
Peppa is excited to help George explore the world of sounds now he has his hearing aid. She shows him her favourite sounds including the splashing of jumping in a muddy puddle! (VS)
It's the day of the duck race! When Miss Rabbit gives the sign, everyone drops their ducks in the river at the first bridge - whose will make it to the second bridge first?
Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach.
Stan and his friends are at the Ley to do a nature survey but strangely, there doesn't seem to be anything to spot. Where has all the wildlife gone?
...Sky-High Stunt Show. When Francois's big stunt show goes horribly awry, the Air Rescue pups are on a roll!
Milo and pals are making jam at Farmer Tilly's factory but spend too long eating the fruit! They speed up the machine to make up for lost time but end up in a sticky situation. (BSL)

programmes.show_name: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programmes.show_description: Holly takes some frogspawn home from class to look after, but she gets a shock when it turns into tadpoles by the next morning. (VS)
It is fruit day at the supermarket, and Miss Rabbit is making fruit smoothies. Everyone is picking their favourite fruits to blend. George gets a special 'dinosaur' juice. Roar! (VS)
The campers are trying to get in the Forest Book of Records, but all of their record-breaking attempts are derailed by a sleepwalking Pigeon Post.

programmes.show_name: Come & Play with Pip and Posy
programmes.show_description: Can Kemi find Jen? A classic that needs no introduction! Count to 10 and either find somewhere secret to hide or put your seeking skills to the test and track down the other players! (Ep13)
Derek and Lisa read a story about Femi the fairy, who loves playing football more than granting wishes. The only problem is that whatever she kicks seems to cause havoc!

Two widows embark on a grief cruise to celebrate the lives of their departed loved ones. But after the pair visit a shrine, one is found murdered. Jack and Kate are on the case.

programmes.show_name: New: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programmes.show_description: It's a big day for retired expat Jack who's organised a World War II-themed singalong, hoping to raise 1000 Euros for the Poppy Appeal to mark Remembrance Day.
Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.
A simple allotment in Coventry is transforming young lives in a project bringing together young people who were once isolated, spending most of their time indoors or online.
Susan visits Bridlington, Yorkshire, where she sails on a pleasure cruiser, joins the ladies cricket team, and enjoys a model village in the company of pop star Sinitta.
Jeremy Vine hosts as Sally Lindsay and Carol Vorderman tackle a fresh batch of mind-bending puzzles. They're joined by comedian Harriet Kemsley and actress Sunetra Sarker.
Peter needs to keep his cool dealing with the Greens' hot-headed calf Frosty. Matt and Rohin investigate the incredible 'tail' of the tiger who came to Holmfirth, back in the 1940s.
A community is shaken when a student is found crushed in a warehouse. As loyalty and fear bind the locals, Ellis suspects the victim was about to expose a huge scandal.

programmes.show_name: Fare Dodgers: At War with the Law
programmes.show_description: The hunt is on for a suspect thought to have evaded close to £20k of fares in one of South Western Railway's biggest ever fraud cases. Harry has a run in with a barrier basher.

programmes.show_name: Call the Bailiffs: Time to Pay Up!
programmes.show_description: Lewis has a challenging enforcement in the north of England, removing a former premier league footballer's one-time agent from a house the footballer didn't know he owned.
